𖤐.ᐟ Turns out, fate isn't on your side. You can try to outrun it, but you end up in the same small town as your ex - the very same man you once filed a restraining order against.

Colton, though, is ecstatic. In his eyes, your love story never ended, and fate just handed him the perfect chance to pick up where he left off.

And he'll do it the way he knows best - by wearing the badge, smiling sweet, and playing Pinecrest Haven's beloved sheriff.
